top3.sql:
WITH ranked_interests AS (
    SELECT 
        month_year AS time,
        interest_id,
        composition,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition DESC) AS rank_desc,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition ASC) AS rank_asc
    FROM interest_metrics
)
SELECT 
    time,
    interest_id,
    composition
FROM ranked_interests
WHERE rank_desc <= 10 OR rank_asc <= 10
ORDER BY composition DESC, time;

WITH ranked_interests AS (
  SELECT 
    month_year AS time,
    interest_id AS interest_name,
    composition,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY composition DESC) AS rank_high,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY composition ASC) AS rank_low
  FROM interest_metrics
)
SELECT time, interest_name, composition
FROM ranked_interests
WHERE rank_high <= 10 OR rank_low <= 10
ORDER BY composition DESC, time;

    SELECT

        interest_id,
        composition,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition DESC) AS rank_desc,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition ASC) AS rank_asc

)
SELECT 
    time,
    interest_id,
    composition
FROM ranked_interests
WHERE rank_desc <= 10 OR rank_asc <= 10
ORDER BY composition DESC, time;

WITH ranked_interests AS (
    SELECT 
        printf('%02d-%d', _month, _year) AS time,
        interest_id,
        composition,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY composition DESC, _year, _month) AS rank_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY composition ASC, _year, _month) AS rank_asc
    FROM interest_metrics
)
SELECT 
    time,
    interest_id,
    composition
FROM ranked_interests
WHERE rank_desc <= 10 OR rank_asc <= 10
ORDER BY composition DESC, time;

WITH ranked_interests AS (
    SELECT 
        printf('%02d-%d', _month, _year) AS time,
        interest_id,
        composition,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY interest_id ORDER BY composition DESC, _year, _month) AS comp_rank_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY interest_id ORDER BY composition ASC, _year, _month) AS comp_rank_asc
    FROM interest_metrics
),

WITH ranked_interests AS (
    SELECT 
        month_year AS time,
        interest_id,
        composition,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition DESC) AS rank_desc,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY composition ASC) AS rank_asc
    FROM interest_metrics
)
SELECT 
    time,
    interest_id,
    composition
FROM ranked_interests
WHERE rank_desc <= 10 OR rank_asc <= 10
ORDER BY composition DESC, time;
